summary: Completed testing of Multi-Target Bulk Assign feature for Collection Organizer. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend features verified: multi-select category dropdown opens upward with checkboxes, multiple categories can be selected simultaneously (Wall Tiles + Bathroom Tiles + Floor Tiles), button text shows 'Assign {series_count} to {category_count}' format, bulk multi-assign creates badges for all selected categories on series cards and in drop zones, X button on badges still works for unassigning, drag-and-drop single assign still works alongside multi-select bulk assign.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Plus39 supplier data with 4 series (Travertine, Burlington, Artisan, Moonlight)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Target Bulk Assign feature fully tested. Key endpoint: POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/bulk-assign now accepts 'targets' array: [{group_slug, main_category, sub_categories}]. Backwards compatible with single target (flat fields). Frontend data-testids: bulk-target-select (opens dropdown), target-dropdown (dropdown container), target-option-{group_slug}-{category_name_kebab} for checkboxes (e.g., target-option-tiles-wall-tiles), bulk-assign-btn (assign button). Dropdown opens upward (bottom-full positioning). All test assignments were cleaned up after testing.

backend: POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/bulk-assign - supports 'targets' array with multiple category targets
POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/bulk-assign - backwards compatible with single target (group_slug/main_category/sub_categories flat fields)
Multi-target assignment correctly merges sub_categories from all targets onto each product
Bulk assign to 3 categories simultaneously (Wall Tiles + Bathroom Tiles + Floor Tiles) - works correctly
Bulk assign multiple series to multiple categories at once - works correctly
Response message includes all target categories
Unassign endpoint still works for removing individual badges
All 4 Plus39 series can be assigned to multiple categories at once
frontend: Multi-select category dropdown opens upward from the bulk bar with checkboxes for each category
Multiple categories can be checked simultaneously (e.g., Wall Tiles + Bathroom Tiles + Floor Tiles)
After bulk multi-assign, badges for all selected categories appear on series cards
Assignment badges also appear in the correct drop zones on the right panel
X button on individual badges still works for unassigning
Toast notification confirms multi-target assignment (e.g., 'Assigned 2 series to Tiles > Bathroom Tiles, Floor Tiles, Wall Tiles')
Toast notification confirms unassignment (e.g., 'Unassigned Travertine from Bathroom Tiles')
Drag-and-drop single assign still works alongside multi-select bulk assign
